summary: In advanced NSCLC, most patients have poor responses to chemotherapy—with limited long-term survivors—and overall survival remains very short regardless of treatment choice. This lack of significant benefit supports pneumologists' skepticism about chemotherapy’s role in improving patient outcomes.
